game_overlays.matchupNote: The Hurricanes roll into the Bell Centre with a chance to seize control, but a desperate Canadiens squad is fighting to keep their season from slipping into a terminal 0-2 hole. Expect a suffocating, high-stakes atmosphere as Montreal looks to turn the tide before the series shifts south.

The Knicks look to complete a ruthless sweep tonight in Cleveland, aiming to punch their ticket to the NBA Finals and officially end the Cavaliers' season. With a 3-0 stranglehold, New York is one win away from a statement series clincher that would cement their status as the team to beat in the East.
